item.title: The Peter McCormack Show – #176 - Narinder Kaur - Inflation Is Brilliant For The Rich
item.description:
Narinder Kaur joins Peter McCormack to discuss racism, immigration, British politics, feminism, motherhood, young men, the cost of living, minimum wage, small businesses, Reform, Tommy Robinson, the Green Party and whether Britain is being divided by politicians, media and algorithms.


They disagree on plenty, but the conversation ends somewhere unexpected: perhaps left and right are not the real enemy - perhaps ordinary people are being played by the system.


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -


TIMESTAMPS:

00:00:53 - Tea, Cake & Online Arguments

00:02:36 - Did Brexit Break Britain’s Conversations?

00:04:37 - Is Politics the Problem?

00:05:35 - The Algorithm Rewards Rage

00:07:30 - Are Podcasts Complicit?

00:08:15 - Narinder’s Experience of Racism

00:11:40 - Young Men & the Manosphere

00:12:20 - Dating, Money & Modern Expectations

00:16:16 - Motherhood, Family and Staying at Home

00:18:23 - “You Sound Right Wing”

00:20:00 - Why Aren’t Western Women Having Babies?

00:27:37 - Why Can’t Young People Afford Life?

00:29:52 - The Cantillon Effect Explained

00:30:37 - Inflation Is Brilliant for the Rich

00:33:33 - Is Taxing the Rich the Answer?

00:43:22 - A Rich Person’s Secret

00:52:04 - Minimum Wage vs Small Business

01:04:52 - “Maybe I Am Conservative”

01:07:14 - Immigration: The Big One

01:16:10 - What Is British Culture?

01:21:51 - Would Britain Collapse Without Immigrants?

01:22:57 - Rupert Lowe, Restore & Race

01:25:59 - Where Should the Immigration Line Be?

01:28:49 - Are Women Really Safe?

01:32:24 - Is the Government Keeping Us Divided?

01:35:15 - Can There Be a Public Revolution?

01:43:40 - Can We Find Common Ground?

01:51:17 - We Can Disagree and Still Talk


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys – The European Bitcoin Ban Hiding In Plain Sight with Matyas Kuchar - State of Bitcoin Ep. 238
item.description:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective — it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar — co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy — to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

→ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic — and why it wasn't even a direct ban

→ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes — all started in Prague)

→ Why the petrodollar is dying — and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

→ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold — and which approach is right

→ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR — and why most Americans haven't heard about it

→ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

→ Why even an anarcho-capitalist now meets with politicians — and what changed his mind

→ Why Bitcoin is no longer just savings — it's the network of people building the future you actually want to live in

🚨 JOIN ME AT BTC PRAGUE 2026

The largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe — June 11-13. Use code GREENCANDLE for discounted tickets:

https://btcprague.com/

🎯 PROTECT YOUR BITCOIN WITH SALT LENDING

Borrow against your Bitcoin without selling a single sat. Green Candle viewers get an exclusive offer:

https://saltlending.com/green-candle

🎯 PLAN YOUR WEALTH WITH STRONG WEALTH

Build a Bitcoin-aligned wealth strategy — estate planning, tax optimization, portfolio construction:

https://strongwealth.net/

🎯 MINE BITCOIN WITH SIMPLE MINING

First-year repairs free for Green Candle listeners:

https://simplemining.io/green-candle

📊 REFERENCED IN THIS EPISODE

• MiCA regulation (EU 2023/1114) — Markets in Crypto-Assets framework

• Czech Republic Bitcoin tax exemption (3-year hold rule)

• Slush Pool (founded 2010 in Prague, first ever Bitcoin mining pool)

• BIP-39 seed phrase standard (developed in Prague)

• Trezor hardware wallet (first ever, founded in Prague)

• EU CBDC pilot programs (launching 2026)

• BTC Prague 2026 conference — June 11-13

Bitcoin #BTCPrague #Matyas #MiCA #BitcoinEurope #CBDC #BitcoinPolicy #EuropeanBitcoin #BitcoinConference #SoundMoney #Petrodollar #BitcoinAdoption #CzechRepublic #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinNews

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for weekly Bitcoin, macro, and personal finance content.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This video is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

]]>

item.title: Surfin' Bitcoin – Il met du BITCOIN dans la trésorerie de sa PME de 100 salariés (retour terrain)
item.description:
Comment un dirigeant de PME en place une partie de la trésorerie de son entreprise en Bitcoin ? Pourquoi ? Combien ? Avec quelles précautions ?


Dans cet épisode, Jonathan Herscovici reçoit Wojtek Jamka, cofondateur de Web-Atrio (https://www.web-atrio.com), une ESN française de 100 salariés et 9 M€ de chiffre d'affaires, cliente de StackinSat en DCA automatique.


Wojtek partage sans filtre son retour d'expérience de dirigeant qui a fait le choix d'allouer une partie de la trésorerie excédentaire de sa société en Bitcoin.


Au programme de cet épisode :

➤ Pourquoi les comptes à terme bancaires sont structurellement perdants face à l'inflation

➤ Comment son histoire personnelle (né dans la Pologne soviétique) a forgé sa compréhension de la dévaluation monétaire

➤ La méthodologie concrète de Web-Atrio : DCA mensuel + acceptation des paiements clients en Bitcoin

➤ La règle des 5 à 10 % de trésorerie blocable à ne pas dépasser

➤ Self custody, multisignature, protocoles anti-enlèvement : sécuriser les Bitcoin d'une entreprise

➤ Bitcoin direct, ETF, Bitcoin Treasury Companies : quel véhicule choisir selon son profil

➤ Comment convaincre un dirigeant qui hésite


Un épisode complémentaire de notre interview avec Alexandre Laizet (Capital B) sur les Bitcoin Treasury Companies, cette fois côté PME non cotée.


📊 Vous êtes dirigeant et souhaitez placer une partie de votre trésorerie en Bitcoin ?

StackinSat accompagne les entreprises dans la gestion de leur trésorerie BTC.

👉 https://stackinsat.com/signup/1?r=SURFIN


00:00 – Introduction : Wojtek Jamka, dirigeant de Web-Atrio (ESN, 100 salariés)

03:12 – Pourquoi Bitcoin pour une PME ? Comptes à terme, inflation et trésorerie qui se déprécie

10:58 – De la Pologne soviétique à Bitcoin : ce qu'on apprend quand sa monnaie ne vaut plus rien

15:38 – Conviction personnelle ou décision rationnelle ? La double lecture du dirigeant

17:40 – DCA, paiements clients en BTC : combien Web-Atrio alloue réellement, et la limite des 5 à 10 %

23:27 – Volatilité et sommeil du dirigeant : pourquoi le DCA bat le trading

28:05 – Self custody, multisig, protection contre l'enlèvement : sécuriser les BTC d'une entreprise

30:56 – Quel profil de PME peut franchir le pas ? Frenchtech, industrie, artisans

35:18 – Bitcoin direct, ETF, Bitcoin Treasury Companies : quel véhicule choisir ?

38:19 – Décision financière ou philosophique ? Et comment convaincre un dirigeant qui hésite

43:48 – Conclusion


🎓 Pour comprendre Bitcoin avant d'investir, suivez notre formation "Investir en Bitcoin" :

👉 https://www.investir-en-bitcoin.com/


📉 Mesurez la perte de pouvoir d'achat de votre trésorerie avec notre simulateur d'inflation :

👉 https://stackinsat.com/simulateur-inflation



🔔 Abonnez-vous à Surfin' Bitcoin pour ne manquer aucun épisode

👍 Likez la vidéo si elle vous a plu

💬 Posez vos questions en commentaires



⚠️ Cette vidéo ne constitue pas un conseil en investissement. Bitcoin est un actif volatil. N'investissez que ce que vous êtes prêt à perdre. Faites vos propres recherches.

Hébergé par Acast. Visitez acast.com/privacy pour plus d'informations.

]]>

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell – Michael Saylor & Phong Le Answer Retail Investors' Biggest Questions
item.description:
What's next for Strategy, STRC, and the Bitcoin industry?

In this special live Retail Investor Q&A, Natalie Brunell sits down with Michael Saylor and Phong Le to answer the biggest questions from retail investors.

From dividend changes and mNAV targets to DeFi risk, Bitcoin at $10 million, and whether Strategy plans to sell BTC soon, this conversation covers the issues investors are watching most closely.

Topics include:

  • STRC's proposed move from monthly to semi-monthly dividends
  • Strategy's plan to restore mNAV to 3–4x
  • Risks around DeFi products built on top of STRC
  • What Strategy looks like in a Bitcoin-at-$10-million world
  • Whether Strategy is gearing up to sell Bitcoin

For more information on Strategy's products, visit www.strategy.com/notes

----

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach – Behind The World's First Bitcoin Air Taxi Network in El Salvador
item.description:
Explore how James McBride (@cnasalvador) is building El Salvador’s sovereign aviation infrastructure. From ferrying a helicopter 3,000 miles to launching the first Bitcoin-friendly air taxi, learn how Cielo Norte Aviacion is decentralizing the skies and skipping fiat traffic jams.

National sovereignty depends on more than just a digital currency because citizens remain limited by crumbling fiat infrastructure and exhausting traffic jams. In this episode, James McBride argues that freedom requires the physical infrastructure to move as fast as Bitcoin. By launching Cielo Norte Aviacion, James is betting that the future of the Salvadoran Citadel depends on decentralizing the skies to allow for a level of mobility that was previously impossible in Central America.

The journey to establish this vision involved a literal trial by fire that started with a grueling international flight from Northern Ontario. James recounts the logistics of ferrying a helicopter 3,000 miles across borders while navigating the shifting regulations of multiple countries and searching for jet fuel in remote regions. This story of grit and proof of work highlights the massive physical effort required to build a new business in the Bitcoin nation and describes the immense relief he felt when the aircraft finally touched down on Salvadoran soil.

As James reaches the finish line of his AAC certification, he is preparing to launch a high speed air taxi service that changes the last mile logistics of El Salvador. His fleet offers private charters that reach world class surf breaks like Punta Mango in under thirty minutes so that travelers can bypass the nightmare traffic of San Salvador. This initiative creates a functional network that connects the most remote and beautiful locations in the country to the economic heart of the city.

The business expansion includes a clear roadmap for industrial and government support alongside tourism. By utilizing aerial surveying and Lidar technology, Cielo Norte facilitates mining operations and infrastructure planning with a level of precision and speed that drones cannot match. This technical edge and the future addition of fixed-wing aircraft for cargo position the company to become the backbone of Salvadoran industry and a critical pillar of the economic rebirth of the country.

James also shares a behind the scenes look at his private meeting with President Bukele where he pitched the vision of making El Salvador the aviation hub of Latin America. This comprehensive family approach spanning from Bitcoin exchanges to the skies reflects a unique moment in history where entrepreneurs are actively building the world they want to live in. Whether you are a pilot interested in technical flight rules or a Bitcoiner looking for the next frontier of growth, this episode demonstrates that the sky is no longer the limit in El Salvador.

—Bitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about James McBride
X (Company): https://x.com/cnasalvador
Web: https://www.cielonorteaviacion.com/
IG: https://www.instagram.com/cielonorteaviacion/
WhatsApp (Business Line): +503 7745 8200

Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach 
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com 

Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 Intro
01:13 Why the McBride family moved their business to El Salvador
02:48 Scaling a Canadian mining airline into a Salvadoran charter
04:12 Flying a helicopter 3,000 miles from Canada to El Salvador
06:15 How air taxis solve the San Salvador traffic nightmare
11:51 Navigating 10,000-foot mountain ranges under VFR rules
13:38 Why El Salvador’s geography is perfect for helicopters
16:02 Using Lidar aerial surveying for mining and

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll – From Libra to Legitimacy: Circle's Stablecoin R(e)volution
item.description:
In this episode of BFRR, Jonas and guest host Jonathan Koll welcome back one of the most influential voices in digital money: Dante Disparte, Head of Strategy and Global Policy at Circle. Four years after his last appearance on the show, Dante returns for a wide-ranging conversation on how stablecoins moved from regulatory controversy to the core of the global financial system.

The discussion begins with Dante’s personal path into crypto: from cyber risk and financial resilience to the early blockchain debates, the Libra project, and the hard lessons learned when big ideas collide with politics, regulation and public trust. Looking back, Dante argues that Libra may have been controversial, but it also accelerated the global conversation around digital money and helped pave the way for today’s regulatory clarity.

From there, the conversation turns to Circle’s evolution. Once mainly known as the issuer of USDC, Circle is now positioning itself as a full-stack financial infrastructure company. Dante explains the role of USDC as a regulated digital dollar, EURC as the leading euro-denominated stablecoin, USYC as a tokenized money market fund, and Circle’s broader technology stack, including the Circle Payments Network and the upcoming ARK blockchain.

The episode also explores the changing stablecoin use cases: from crypto trading and decentralized finance to cross-border payments, capital markets collateral, store-of-value demand in unstable economies and even agentic commerce, where AI systems may increasingly transact with each other using programmable money.

Regulation is another major theme. Dante compares Europe’s MiCA framework with the U.S. GENIUS Act, discusses the search for international harmonization, and reflects on the United Kingdom’s opportunity to define its own digital asset regime. The conversation also touches on digital identity, financial inclusion, and why open standards may be essential to bring billions of people into the formal economy.

A sharp, thoughtful and occasionally funny episode about stablecoins, regulation, institutional adoption and the future of money — with one of the few people who has been at the center of the debate from Libra to Circle.

Dante Disparte LinkedIn

Dante Disparte X

Circle Website

Article Korea Herald

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Telegram Channel

Point Zero Forum: Join us in Zurich on 23–25 June 2026 at the Point Zero Forum, the annual gathering of 2,000+ policymakers, central bankers, regulators, and industry leaders at the intersection of finance, technology, and policy: Click here. Use the code "BFRR2026" to get 30% off the full-price Industry Pass. BFRR is proud media partner of the event. Relai: Buy Bitcoin with Relai—you can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll.

Value4Value Podcast Streaming: Support our podcast by listening to our episodes on the Fountain Podcast App. This way, if you wish, you can support us "Value4Value" while listening to the podcast. You can find us on the Fountain Podcast App here: Click here

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own research—inform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute – Bitcoin Policy Hour: Crypto-Redollarization: Gold, Tether & Bitcoin Shaping the New Monetary Order
item.description:
Why did Tether launch a U.S. stablecoin now? Why does Coinbase have so much influence in Congress? And what’s really behind the SEC–CFTC harmonization push? Bitcoin Policy Hour breaks down the biggest regulatory stories shaping Bitcoin’s future plus a deep look at the debasement trade driving gold, silver, and potentially bitcoin higher.🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/Chapters: 03:15 – Tether’s GENIUS-Compliant U.S. Stablecoin Explained 07:30 – Is Tether’s U.S. Launch a Political Hedge? 11:45 – Stablecoins, Circle, and Global Liquidity 15:30 – SEC–CFTC Harmonization and Regulatory Power 20:10 – Market Structure, BRCA, and Developer Protections 26:00 – Section 1960 and the National Security Debate 33:20 – Why Coinbase Has So Much Influence in Congress 41:00 – Stablecoin Yield, Banks, and Political Fatigue 47:00 – Gold, Silver, Debasement, and Bitcoin’s Moment

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value – Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠BitVault⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.


Follow us on:

Website: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠https://storeofbitcoin.com/⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show – Bitcoin Core Has Been Compromised | Matthew Kratter | BIS #203
item.description:
Matthew Kratter joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about the escalating fight against spam on Bitcoin, why he believes Bitcoin Core has been compromised, and how the pleb migration to Bitcoin Knots has gone from 1% to 25% of the network in under two years. Kratter walks through the case for BIP-110 as a temporary soft fork, explains why mining pool centralization is the structural problem underneath everything else, and shares his own setup for renting hashrate at industrial scale from home using Datum Gateway and Ocean. The conversation also covers the rotting culture inside Bitcoin Core, why slaying our heroes still matters when figures like Adam Back behave erratically, and what self-custody, sound money, and Bitcoin sovereignty actually demand from us when the protocol itself is under cultural attack.

Connect with Matthew:

https://x.com/mattkratter

https://www.bitcoinuniversity.com/

https://www.bitcoinuniversity.com/mining

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

item.itunes:summary:
Matthew Kratter joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about the escalating fight against spam on Bitcoin, why he believes Bitcoin Core has been compromised, and how the pleb migration to Bitcoin Knots has gone from 1% to 25% of the network in under two years. Kratter walks through the case for BIP-110 as a temporary soft fork, explains why mining pool centralization is the structural problem underneath everything else, and shares his own setup for renting hashrate at industrial scale from home using Datum Gateway and Ocean. The conversation also covers the rotting culture inside Bitcoin Core, why slaying our heroes still matters when figures like Adam Back behave erratically, and what self-custody, sound money, and Bitcoin sovereignty actually demand from us when the protocol itself is under cultural attack.

Connect with Matthew:

https://x.com/mattkratter

https://www.bitcoinuniversity.com/

https://www.bitcoinuniversity.com/mining

Connect with Us:

item.title: Bitcoin Archive w Archie – Astrophysicist Destroys Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Model
item.description:
In this conversation with Stephen Perrenod, astrophysicist, quantum computing expert, and co-founder of the Scientific Bitcoin Institute. we explore Bitcoin through the lens of physics, network theory, and power law dynamics.

We also discuss Bitcoin’s relationship to gold, the limits of exponential growth, the risks facing Bitcoin treasury companies, and whether quantum computing poses a serious threat to the network.

⚠️ Bitcoin may not be following a speculative cycle at all, but a deeply embedded network-driven power law that reflects how complex systems grow over time.


CONNECT WITH STEPHEN PERRENOD

X: ⁠https://x.com/moneyordebt⁠

Substack: ⁠https://substack.com/@stephenperrenod⁠


FOLLOW THE PODCAST

 

🍏 APPLE - ⁠https://bit.ly/BitcoinArchiveAP⁠ 

📺 YOUTUBE - ⁠https://bit.ly/BitcoinArchiveY⁠ 

⚡️ RUMBLE - ⁠https://bit.ly/BitcoinArchiveRU⁠ 

🌳 AMAZON - ⁠https://bit.ly/BitcoinArchiveAM⁠


CONNECT WITH ARCHIE

X/Twitter: ⁠https://bit.ly/BitcoinArchiveX

]]>

item.title: einemillionsatoshi - der Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Beziehung: Warum Überzeugen selten funktioniert
item.description:
Deine Begeisterung für Bitcoin ist riesig, aber zu Hause stößt du auf Granit? In dieser Folge von "einemillionsatoshi" erfährst du, wie du das Thema Bitcoin in deine Beziehung bringst, ohne einen Familienstreit auszulösen. Ich bespreche, warum technisches Fachchinesisch oft der falsche Weg ist und wie du stattdessen über gesellschaftliche Werte und echte Lösungen für Alltagsprobleme wie die Inflation sprichst.

Erwähnte Podcasts & Ressourcen:

👉 Anita Posch: https://anitaposch.com/

Vielen Dank, dass du meine Arbeit unterstützt.

item.title: The Bitcoin Way Podcast – Why The Google Quantum Narrative is a Myth | Jimmy Song
item.description:
🔑 Learn about our self-custody services: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_campaign=podcast&utm_medium=podcast&utm_source=youtube

📞 Schedule a FREE call: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/contact?utm_campaign=podcast&utm_medium=social&utm_source=youtube

📖 Subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=podcast&utm_medium=social&utm_source=youtube

In episode #116 of The Bitcoin Way Podcast, Michael Jordan and legendary Bitcoin developer Jimmy Song examine Bitcoin’s development landscape, exposing how mono-implementation creates systemic risk.

They discuss Production Ready’s “Third Way,” why Google’s quantum labs operate on hype-based incentives, and the engineering reality preventing cryptographic threats.

The conversation covers Core v30 feedback loops, the folly of fear-based protocol changes like BIP-361, and why market “death narratives” often precede bull runs.

Essential viewing for anyone serious about understanding Bitcoin’s true security and governance.

Follow Jimmy on X at https://x.com/jimmysong, visit his website at https://jimmysong.org, and check out his project Production Ready at productionready.org.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:

00:00 – Introduction

01:27 – Bitcoin Development Ideals

03:55 – Mono-Implementation Risks

08:07 – Core v30.0 Controversy

10:10 – Voting with Your Feet

13:42 – Where Consensus Fails

18:35 – Introducing Production Ready

22:24 – The Third Way Dynamic

36:38 – Quantum Computing Myths

38:55 – Quantum Physics Reality

41:55 – Google Rent-Seekers

43:54 – How Innovation Happens

46:44 – BIP-360 & Fear-Based Code

51:37 – Satoshi Death Narratives

54:07 – 2013 Silk Road Lessons

57:16 – Bitcoin is Christian Money

57:52 – Outro & Links

⏯️ RECENT PODCASTS:

$1M Bitcoin Is Inevitable | Nik Bhatia: https://youtu.be/-4miMq-mzRE

From Ferrari to Scooter - Sold Millions to Exit Australia | Adam Hudson: https://youtu.be/MWcYNs1oBMI

🎧 LISTEN TO OUR OTHER EPISODES:

On The Bitcoin Way Podcast, Michael Jordan talks to guests with a wide range of expertise and skillsets related to Bitcoin, including investing, macroeconomic and financial trends, mining, education, and more.

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast – Bitcoin vs the Surveillance State | Bitcoin Magazine Podcast Ep 9
item.description:
The UK government is regulating Bitcoin the same way it regulates meme coins and the consequences are already showing. Susie Violet Ward of Bitcoin Policy UK joins Brandon Green to explain why the FCA's blanket approach is dangerous, how KYC data leaks are fueling a wave of violent physical attacks across Europe, and why Bitcoin mining could save the UK over a billion pounds a year in wasted energy. They also tackle the stablecoin debate and Susie's year-long fight to get the BBC to correct false Bitcoin reporting.🔶 Brandon Green - BTC Inc CEO

🔶 Susie Violet Ward - CEO & Co-Founder of Bitcoin Policy UK and Bitcoin Journalist

Chapters:

2:45 — The State of Bitcoin Regulation Across the Pond

10:30 — The FCA's Flawed Approach to Bitcoin Regulation in the UK

16:40 — Why Separating Bitcoin from Crypto Is the Top Priority

22:00 — Stablecoin Legislation and the US Regulatory Parallel

27:15 — KYC, the FATF Travel Rule, and the Rise of Violent Wrench Attacks

32:28 — Susie's 13-Month Battle with the BBC Over False Reporting

40:16 — Alex de Vries and the Mainstream Media Misinformation Pipeline

46:09 — Bitcoin Mining as the Solution to the UK Energy Crisis

52:21 — Finland, Farm Sovereignty, and Real-World Mining Use Cases

57:14 — Stablecoins Are CBDCs by the Back Door

#Bitcoin #BitcoinMining #BitcoinRegulation #BitcoinUK #FCA #BitcoinPolicy #KYC #FinancialSurveillance #WrenchAttack #Stablecoins #CBDC #BitcoinMagazine #BitcoinPodcast #SelfCustody #ProofOfWork #BitcoinMiningEnergy #SeparateMoneyAndState #BitcoinFreedom #DigitalAssets #BitcoinStrategicReserve #FATFTravelRule #BBCBitcoin #SusieVioletWard #BitcoinConference #EnergyGrid #DemandResponse #BitcoinAdoption #MonetarySovereignty #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinEducation

DISCLAIMER: The views and opinions expressed in this show are those of the participants and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of BTC Inc., Bitcoin Magazine, or any affiliated entities. This content is provided for informational and educational purposes only and should not be construed as investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice. Nothing contained in this show constitutes a solicitation, recommendation, endorsement, or offer to buy or sell any securities or financial instruments. Viewers should consult their own advisors before making financial or business decisions.

item.title: Münzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast – Mt. Gox: "Withdrawal denied". Episode 5
item.description:
Doch der Weg ins Chaos war kein einziger Sprung. Es begann mit einer Serie von Sicherheitspannen und technischem Versagen – Warnsignale, die ignoriert wurden. Diese Inkompetenz schuf ein Vakuum, ein digitales Schlupfloch, durch das schließlich nicht nur Fehler, sondern echte Angreifer strömten. Erst die chronischen Pannen, dann der massive Hack, der das System endgültig zum Einsturz brachte.

Willkommen zur fünften Ausgabe unseres Podcasts. Wir sind tief in den Fall Mt. Gox eingetaucht, um diesen komplexen Skandal chronologisch zu entwirren. Von den bescheidenen Anfängen in der Frühzeit von Bitcoin bis hin zu den heutigen, kaum zu fassenden Auswüchsen dieses historischen Desasters. Wir zeigen euch, wie aus einer kleinen Nischenplattform einer der größten Bitcoin-Skandale aller Zeiten wurde – und warum die Folgen bis heute nachhallen.

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com

Nostr:
npub14cz50cvahflq8kpe57qxnnvgmveyng6l8fdtessdqm8ht9fcly3qjd20ry

X:
https://x.com/Muenzcrime

E-Mail:
muenzcrime@tuta.io

Links zur Folge:
https://www.mtgox.com/ 
https://forklog.com/en/mt-gox-the-biggest-hack-in-cryptocurrency-history/?keywords=binance&sort=-relevance&index&is_active=true 
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mt._Gox 
https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2015/02/19/report-mt-gox-data-provides-more-clues-to-trading-bot-willy 
https://willyreport.wordpress.com/2014/05/25/the-willy-report-proof-of-massive-fraudulent-trading-activity-at-mt-gox-and-how-it-has-affected-the-price-of-bitcoin/ 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hvCdu0zsSP4 
https://x.com/brucefenton/status/2049593550506242127 
https://darknetdiaries.com/transcript/9/ 
https://www.irs.gov/zh-hans/compliance/criminal-investigation/russian-nationals-charged-with-hacking-one-cryptocurrency-exchange-and-illicitly-operating-another 
https://www.vccircle.com/former-ceo-of-failed-bitcoin-exchange-mt-gox-pleads-not-guilty-to-embezzlement 
https://bdnews24.com/world/d36b99f0b6f3 
https://www.cnbc.com/2024/07/05/mt-gox-begins-repaying-bitcoin-to-creditors-a-decade-on-from-collapse.html 
https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/10/27/mt-gox-delays-creditor-repayment-to-october-2026 
https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2017/11/ceo-who-presided-over-mt-goxs-collapse-could-end-up-with-massive-profits/]]>

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News – Nobody's Ready For What The Clarity Act Just Did To Bitcoin | Joe Consorti
item.description:
The Clarity Act just changed everything for Bitcoin — and almost no one is talking about it.

Joe Consorti joins the show for a deep dive into why the Clarity Act could be the single biggest regulatory unlock in Bitcoin's history, and the chain of events it's about to set off on a global scale.

Here's what we cover:

• Why the Clarity Act could trigger a sovereign-level Bitcoin accumulation race — and which countries move first

• The Strait of Hormuz crisis: how a full closure could send oil past $200 a barrel — and why Wall Street is completely asleep at the wheel

• The inflationary time bomb quietly building beneath the surface of markets

• AI and the biggest productivity boom in history — why governments will be forced to print in response and how Bitcoin becomes the ultimate beneficiary

If you think Bitcoin's regulatory moment is already priced in, this conversation will change your mind.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal – 2344: Trump Signs Bitcoin Executive Order Opening Wall Street Floodgates
item.description:
Trump just signed an executive order integrating digital assets into traditional finance and payments - a major legitimacy shift that could accelerate Wall Street Bitcoin adoption. At the same time, Strategy now controls roughly 4% of all Bitcoin that will ever exist, BlackRock increased exposure, Bank of America expanded its Bitcoin position, and mainstream ownership continues rising.

Bitcoin does not need mass adoption first. It only takes enough capital colliding with fixed supply. In this episode, we break down why the real Bitcoin move happens before the average buyer feels comfortable - and why $10M Bitcoin is ultimately a supply math problem.

For the full premium livestream experience with video, visit our Rumble at http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin Kidnappings, AI Slop, Quantum FUD, and Memetic Warfare | coinjoined Chris
item.description:
In this episode of THE Bitcoin Podcast, Walker sits down with coinjoined Chris for a wide-ranging conversation covering Bitcoin security, privacy, memes, AI propaganda, self-custody, and the future of freedom tech. They discuss the rise in violent “$5 wrench attacks” against Bitcoiners, operational security best practices, and why privacy tools and self-custody matter more than ever in an increasingly surveilled world.

They also dive deep into Bitcoin scaling debates, covenant proposals, quantum computing fears, and whether Bitcoin should continue evolving or ossify over time. Along the way, they explore AI-generated media, the changing culture of Bitcoin, the rise of institutional “Suitcoiners,” and why memes remain one of the most powerful forms of modern propaganda.

The conversation closes with reflections on sovereignty, CBDCs, the future of money, and a philosophical speed round on plebs, voting, podcasts, and the fall of Rome.

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS – Korrekturen sind positive Normalität
item.description:
In den vergangenen Wochen deuteten viele Zeichen auf eine Erholung und den Beginn einer Aufwärtsbewegung beim Bitcoin hin. Doch die Geduld der Marktteilnehmer wird erneut auf die Probe gestellt: Ende letzter Woche fiel die Krypto-Leitwährung unter die viel beachtete Marke von 80.000 Dollar und notiert weiterhin darunter. Was hinter diesem Rücksetzer steckt, ob es sich um einen nachhaltigen Bruch handelt, wie man sich jetzt positionieren sollte und was Anlegern in naher Zukunft bei Bitcoin und Altcoins bevorsteht, erläutert Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG) in einer neuen Folge von „BITCOIN & ALTCOINS“.

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht für etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

Das Gespräch wurde am 11.05.2026 an der Frankfurter Börse aufgezeichnet.

Tägliche Informationen gefällig? Dann ab zu „Krypto-Insights“ – dem Telegram-Kanal von Oliver Michel und Johanna Krämer. Weitere Infos unter www.krypto-insights.de

]]>

item.title: All In Bitcoin – 032 American Hodl: Bitcoin is Forever War | KNOTS vs Core & BlackRock | All in Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
🎙️American Hodl: Bitcoin is Forever War | KNOTS vs Core & BlackRock | All in Bitcoin w/CK

American HODL got into Bitcoin in 2014. He's seen every cycle since, every war, every wave of new people arrive and dilute the culture he helped build. In this episode he doesn't hold back.

Nietzsche, René Girard, and whether Bitcoiners become the thing they fight. The block size war and the PTSD it left behind. Why the KNOTS vs Core debate is a sideshow — and what BlackRock is quietly doing to Bitcoin's development culture that actually matters. The four-year cycle: broken or evolving? And the big unresolved tension that will define Bitcoin's future: freedom versus number go up.

Plus: when is deception moral? What Bukele got right. Why Europe is headed for civil war. And why Bitcoin is not a phase, not a moment — it's forever war.

And we're making a Bitcoin movie: BIP-110, KNOTS vs Core. You'll have to watch to get the pitch!

Bitcoin #AmericanHODL #BitcoinPodcast #BitcoinMaximalism #BlockSizeWar #BlackRock #BitcoinForeverWar #Cypherpunks #btc

https://linktr.ee/allinbitcoin

👇FOLLOW CK & ALL IN BITCOIN:

allinbitcoin@nostrplebs.com

item.title: The Why Bitcoin Show – #100 - 100 Not Out: Reflections, Regrets and Why I'm Just Getting Started
item.description:
Episode 100. No intro. No ads. Just me.

This one is different. Just an honest reflection on 100 episodes, what this journey has actually been like, and where things are heading.

I share what drove me to start the show, the momentum I built and lost, the guests who genuinely changed how I think, and something personal I haven't said publicly before about confidence, doubt, and what it's taken to finally back myself.

I also explain why I built My Bitcoin Will, a DIY Bitcoin inheritance starter kit designed to help people get off zero and start closing the gap between law, access, and education.

If you're not ready to dive in yet, start with the free Bitcoin Inheritance Stress Test or download the checklist at My Bitcoin Will.

Also, some gentle shilling from my side. I've written a book. No Tenants, No Troubles: The Case for Digital Over Real Estate. Available on Amazon now: https://www.dalewarburton.com/book

Need a hand with self-custody? Book a session with me to get your Bitcoin security house in order.

And get on Nostr if you haven't already. It's a game changer. npub1r94hh3kt6re3j5jv7yg8rw0ah5fg90vw9pjklxzknvhdkx0famfsn0njzt

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible – Chat_167 - Why Your Keys Matter with Seed
item.description:
"If you think of River or Gemini or Coinbase or whatever, think of all of those as silos and how people custody Bitcoin. If some sort of compromise were to come into the Bitcoin ecosystem at the private key generation level, that could create an incident that could set Bitcoin back by 10 or more years because it would be almost indistinguishable from a protocol compromise and that we would be talking about Bitcoin being hacked again and not individual custodians being hacked. So I think we need to decentralise how people do Bitcoin custody as much as possible and what better way by leveraging private freedom preserving open source software."

~ Seed

In today’s chat, I sat down with Seed, the creator of the SeedSigner project, and his backstory is completely wild.

He told the story of how he got pulled into Bitcoin through a forensic case tied to a local Silk Road user, why he panic sold in 2017, and how that path eventually led him back to the basics and into building one of the most respected DIY signers in the space. But the real tension in this episode is the part most people skip over: what actually keeps your coins safe when things get messy in the real world.

We talk about the grim reality of wrench attacks, what actually happens when law enforcement flips a house upside down with a search warrant, and how a former forensics cop secures his own wealth. If you think a standard hardware wallet hidden in a sock drawer is enough, hearing his threat models might completely rewrite your long-term storage plans. And yes, we got into a few stories that made me think about my own setup a lot differently.

Guest Links

  • Seed on X (Link: https://x.com/sesi_the_man)
  • SeedSigner on X (Link: https://x.com/SeedSigner)
  • Today in Bitcoin History on X (Link: https://x.com/daily_btc_lore)
  • SeedSigner's Website (Link: https://seedsigner.com/)

Affiliate Links

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get ⁠10% off the COLDCARD⁠ with code BITCOINAUDIBLE ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)
  • (Under construction) Check out the list of products and services I use and recommend on BitcoinAudible.com (Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/)

Host Links

  • ⁠Guy on Nostr ⁠(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • ⁠Guy on X ⁠(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • ⁠Bitcoin Audible on X⁠ (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in führenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir über die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die mögliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spaß beim Zuhören!

Zudem reden wir auch noch über die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- Lösungen für eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einführt

- Bitcoin Städte Spiel: Errate die fünf beliebtesten Bitcoin Städte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben verändert hat

- Glaskugel: Bitcoin Preis am Ende des Jahres 2025Podcast Folge auf Spotify:

---------------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.bitbucks.de/Apple Download: https://apps.apple.com/de/app/bitcoin-wallet-bitbucks/id1453167599

Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.fuf.bitbucks&pli=1

https://www.instagram.com/bit_bucks/

https://open.spotify.com/show/0bhDawE23ld6lPw7KnqUH5?si=5182b2525e7144db

Vernetz dich gerne mit den Rednern :)

01:15 Wie bist du zu Bitcoin gekommen?

07:45 Thema Bitcoin: Bevölkerung vs. Unternehmen/Politik

12:46 Was sind deine Verbesserungsvorschläge?

item.description: <![CDATA[This week, David Sencil and Graham Stone unpack a heavy macro week — from the 30-year US Treasury clearing 5% for the first time since 2007, to Strategy’s $1.5B convertible note buyback and Michael Saylor quietly testing the market on Bitcoin sales.They dig into Iran’s reported “Hormuz Safe” Bitcoin sanctions-bypass scheme, why David thinks Bitcoin is actually worse than fiat for evading sanctions, and the Coinbase/Circle/Hyperliquid USDC deal that triggered CME and ICE to run to regulators.Plus: David’s CFTC Chairman Michael Selig interview from Vegas, Austin Campbell on the Clarity Act, and Graham vs David on whether the bill actually passes by July 4th.Topics covered:• 30-year US Treasury clears 5% — what it means for hard assets• Iran’s Hormuz Safe Bitcoin maritime insurance play• Why David thinks Bitcoin is worse than fiat for sanctions evasion• Strategy’s $1.5B convertible note buyback and Saylor’s pivot• STRC (“stretch”) — the 11.5% Bitcoin yield play• Hyperliquid lands USDC deal with Coinbase and Circle• CME and ICE lobbying regulators over Hyperliquid• David’s interview with CFTC Chairman Michael Selig• Will the CLARITY Act pass by July 4th? item.title: Bald in Bitcoin – Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 13: Die stille Steuer – Warum der Staat Inflation nicht bekämpfen will
item.description:
Deine Eltern haben dir gesagt: Leg Geld zurück. Sparen lohnt sich.

Guter Rat – damals. Aber heute ist etwas kaputt.

In Folge 12 haben wir gezeigt, warum dein Kontostand stabil aussehen kann und du trotzdem ärmer wirst. Heute gehen wir einen Schritt weiter und stellen die unbequeme Frage dahinter: Warum wird Inflation nicht einfach abgestellt?

Die Antwort: Weil das System genau so gebaut ist.

DAS LERNST DU IN DIESER FOLGE

– Warum Staaten gigantische Schulden durch Inflation heimlich entwerten – Was finanzielle Repression bedeutet – und warum das kein Verschwörungsmythos ist – Wer wirklich die Rechnung zahlt: die stille Steuer auf deine Ersparnisse – Warum das 2%-Ziel der EZB keine zufällige Zahl ist – Was Bitcoin als mengenmäßig begrenztes System damit zu tun hat

WEITERFÜHRENDE EMPFEHLUNGEN

Der Bitcoin-Standard – Saifedean Ammous Schulden: Die ersten 5000 Jahre – David Graeber Reinhart & Sbrancia: The Liquidation of Government Debt (Studie, englisch)

VOR-ORT-KURS – 30. MAI 2026

Bitcoin für Einsteiger – digitales Geld für analog Geborene. Kein Trading. Kein Hype. Einfach ein ruhiger, verständlicher Einstieg. https://bitucation.com/kurs/vor-ort-bitcoin

Hinweis: In dieser Folge wird neben meiner Stimme eine KI-generierte Expertenstimme für technische Erklärpassagen eingesetzt. Alle Inhalte werden von mir recherchiert und geprüft.

⚠️ Keine Finanzberatung. Ausschließlich Bildung und persönliche Perspektive.

]]>

item.title: No Second Best - A Bitcoin Podcast – Did the Federal Reserve Just Open the Door to Bitcoin?
item.description:
Jamie Dimon just went on national television to push back against Bitcoin and crypto legislation. Hours later, a Bitcoin exchange gained direct access to the Federal Reserve's settlement rails.

At the same time, Morgan Stanley filed for a spot Bitcoin ETF while geopolitical tensions escalated in the Middle East and Bitcoin surged.

This episode breaks down the growing conflict between the traditional banking system and the emerging Bitcoin financial infrastructure, and why the global monetary system may already be bending toward neutral, hard money.

]]>

item.title: Thank God for Bitcoin – To The Unknown Pod Episode 42: Bitcoin and A World At War
item.description:
In this episode, Jordan Bush and Ryan Finlay explore the complex intersections of global conflict, economic warfare, and Bitcoin's role as a resilient alternative in a world at war. They analyze recent Middle East tensions, the decline of the petrodollar, and how Bitcoin offers a form of financial sovereignty amidst geopolitical chaos.

]]>

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse – Can Bitcoin Escape the Quantum Black Hole?
item.description:
Is quantum computing Bitcoin's biggest hidden risk - and is anyone actually solving it? In this episode, Dominic Weibel and Luca Gnos sit down with Charles Edwards, founder of Capriole Investments, to break down how geopolitics, macro conditions, and quantum risk are shaping Bitcoin's next move. Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12–24 months.

]]>

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO – 17) ... die Trennung von Geld und Privileg
item.description:
Warum geht die Schere zwischen Arm und Reich immer weiter auf, obwohl wir in einer Zeit des globalen Wachstums leben? Es gibt viele Gründe. Aber unser eigenes Geld ist bevorteilt strukturell eine privilegierte Schicht von Menschen!

In dieser Folge tauchen wir ein in den Cantillon-Effekt. Ein Mechanismus, der fast unsichtbar im Hintergrund arbeitet und dafür sorgt, dass neues Geld niemals alle gleichzeitig erreicht. Wer nah an der Quelle sitzt, profitiert; wer weit weg ist, zahlt die Zeche durch steigende Preise.

Was dich in dieser Folge erwartet:

  • Das Champagner-Gleichnis: Wie sich frisches Geld in einer Pyramide verteilt und warum die unteren Gläser oft leer ausgehen.

  • Richard Cantillon: Was ein Goldminenbesitzer aus dem 18. Jahrhundert uns über unser heutiges Fiat-Geldsystem lehren kann.

  • Systemische Benachteiligung: Warum deine Kaufkraft schwindet, noch bevor die Gehaltserhöhung auf dem Konto ankommt.

  • Bitcoin als Antwort: Warum Bitcoin Privilegien abbaut und wie ein System ohne Zentralbank den Cantillon-Effekt fast vollständig eliminiert.

Erfahre, warum Bitcoin weit mehr ist als nur ein neues Asset. Es ist der Versuch, Geld und Privileg zum ersten Mal in der modernen Geschichte voneinander zu trennen.

Du hast Interesse bitcoin zu kaufen, weisst aber nicht genau wie? Hol dir meinen kostenlosen Leitfaden als Download !

🔗 https://tinyurl.com/45rpsjuc

Folge mir auf Instagram/WhatsApp/Telegram für mehr "Wissen statt Fomo" zum Thema Bitcoin.

Alle Links

🔗 www.linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Hat dir die Folge gefallen? Dann abonniere den Podcast und hinterlasse eine Bewertung. Das hilft mir enorm, Wissen über Bitcoin zu verbreiten!

Bleib dran, dein Christian.

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast – Strategy Is Now Doing What Empery Did First — Selling Bitcoin (Saylor's Gamble To DESTROY Shorts)
item.description:
Ryan Lane raised $500 million in six weeks, bought back more stock than any Bitcoin treasury company by multiples, and grew BTC per share 30% — by doing something most Bitcoin companies won't touch: selling Bitcoin below NAV.

Now Strategy is doing the same thing.

Ryan, founder of Empery Digital and 25-year hedge fund veteran, breaks down the math, explains why Bitcoin treasuries without cash-flow-positive operating businesses won't survive, and makes the case that Kevin Warsh will cut rates faster than Powell ever did — because AI changes the deflation calculus entirely.

item.title: Bitcoin Insights | Bitcoin Podcast mit Philipp 'PJAH' Hartmannsgruber – #16 Im Auto nach El Zonte: Bitcoin in El Salvador mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich
item.description:
In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte über ihre Eindrücke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die alltägliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Präsident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom täglichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielfältigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen Tätigkeiten.

item.title: 21Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast – Aus der Banken IT in die Welt von Bitcoin - Harald Betz
item.description:
Folge #61 – Ein Gespräch über Banken IT und Bitcoin Bücher

Harald Beetz ist seit fast 20 Jahren selbstständig in der Beratung für Banken und Rechenzentren. Angefangen als Banklehrling bei der Sparkasse, hat er früh den Wandel von Beratung hin zu reinem Vertrieb erlebt und sich auf IT-Projekte spezialisiert. In diesem Gespräch erzählt er, wie er von der Banken IT zu Bitcoin kam, warum er mit seiner Frau einen Roman über Geld schrieb und wie er sich heute zwischen Beratung und Content rund um Bitcoin positioniert.


Du erfährst,

  • wie Harald die Bankenwelt von innen erlebt hat,
  • welche Herausforderungen und Chancen es als IT-Berater gibt,
  • warum er Bitcoin zunächst wieder verkaufte und später mit völlig anderem Blick neu entdeckte,
  • wie aus einer Buchidee seiner Frau ein gemeinsames Projekt wurde
  • und welche unternehmerischen Lektionen er aus fast zwei Jahrzehnten Selbstständigkeit mitnimmt.


Kapitel:

  • 00:00 Begrüßung und Vorstellung
  • 02:15 Vom Banklehrling zum IT-Berater
  • 07:40 Veränderungen in der Bankenwelt seit den 2000er Jahren
  • 15:10 Einstieg in die Selbstständigkeit und erste Projekte
  • 22:05 Gescheiterte Produktidee und der Wechsel zur Beratung
  • 29:15 Erster Kontakt mit Bitcoin und die zweite Begegnung
  • 36:50 Der Roman über Geld und Bitcoin
  • 44:20 Zukunft der Beratung im Banken- und Bitcoin-Umfeld
  • 49:00 Wichtigste Tipps für Vertrieb und Resilienz


Links:

Youtube: youtube.com/@MiesesGeld

Webseite: miesesgeld.de

LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/haraldbetz


---

21 Focus - Der Bitcoin-Unternehmer Podcast

Hallo, mein Name ist Daniel Wingen und ich suche den Austausch mit anderen Unternehmern die in Bitcoin eine wichtiges Werkzeug für ihr Unternehmen sehen. Ich möchte selbst lernen und andere dazu inspirieren sich mit Bitcoin im eigenen Unternehmen zu beschäftigen.

Hier kannst Du Teil der Community werden und mich kontaktieren:

Telegram Community: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠t.me/B21Focus⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf X: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠x.com/danielwingen⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ 

Daniel auf LinkedIn:⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ linkedin.com/in/danielwingen/⁠

]]>

item.title: Kryptohelden - Bitcoin, Ethereum & Co meistern - ohne Hektik! – Aufbau eines Web3-Startups: Erkenntnisse vom Gründer von Li.fi mit Philipp Zentner
item.description:
Inhalt
  • Vorstellung von Philipp Zentner und Li.fi
  • Unterschiede zwischen Web2 und Web3 und Anpassung von Geschäftsmodellen an das Web3-Ökosystem
  • Identifizierung von Nischen und Marktbedürfnissen in Web3 im Vergleich zu Web2
  • Aufbau eines starken Teams und Unterschiede bei der Suche und Bindung von Talenten in Web2 und Web3
  • Schaffung einer kollaborativen und innovativen Unternehmenskultur
  • Finanzierung eines Web3-Startups und Unterschiede bei der Finanzierung zwischen Web2 und Web3
  • Tokenomics und regulatorische Überlegungen im Web3-Umfeld
  • Erfahrungen und Herausforderungen beim Marketing und Community-Aufbau von Li.fi
  • Erkenntnisse und Tipps für diejenigen, die ihre eigenen Web3-Unternehmen gründen möchten
  • Zusammenfassung der wichtigsten Punkte und kommende Meilensteine für Li.fi
  • Abschließende Gedanken und Worte der Ermutigung für das Publikum.

Weiterführende Links

item.title: Krypto Corner – Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten – Bonus zu Kap. 33 Warum Bitcoin kein schwarzer Schwan ist (Staffelfinale)
item.description:
Der wilde Westen schließt seine Pforten, die Revolution wird zum Alltag. In dieser 20-minütigen Bonus-Analyse feiern unsere KI-Moderatoren das große Finale der ersten Staffel. Der Krypto-Winter taut endlich auf und der März bringt die ersten warmen Sonnenstrahlen in die Berliner WG-Küche. Tom hat überlebt – er ist seine eigene Bank geworden, hat den Steuer-Dschungel durchquert und die Gier endgültig besiegt.


Wir blicken auf Toms Transformation vom getriebenen Anfänger zum souveränen Investor zurück. Außerdem erklären wir dir das Konzept des "Weißen Schwans": Das unausweichliche Eintreffen der Wall Street und der institutionellen Gelder im Krypto-Space. Wer jetzt sein Fundament aus Beton gegossen hat, hat sich positioniert, bevor die breiten Massen kommen – und ist bereit für das nächste Level.


Das absolute Highlight: Ein erster epischer Ausblick auf Band 2! Wir teasern an, wie du dich im neuen Bullenmarkt positionierst, wie du die Wall-Street-Giganten auf der Blockchain ausspionierst und wie du die komplexen Steuerfallen der neuen Regulierungen meisterst.


Die Highlights dieser Bonus-Analyse:


  • Die Metamorphose: Vom nervösen Zocker zum eiskalten Strategen.



  • Der Weiße Schwan: Warum die Ankunft der Wall Street das vorhersehbarste Event der Finanzgeschichte ist.



  • Die Früchte des Winters: Warum sich die harte Arbeit an Wallets und Steuer-Tools jetzt auszahlt.


Der Ton dieser Episode ist ruhig, befreiend, philosophisch und am Ende extrem triumphal und motivierend!


🚀 BUCH-RELEASE & STAFFEL-FINALE: Schließe Band 1 ab mit „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten“ und mach dich bereit für Band 2!


🔥 EXKLUSIVE BUCH-PREVIEW: Dieser Podcast bietet dir einen exklusiven Einblick in das Standardwerk der Krypto-Welt. Das geballte Wissen der ersten Staffel – von allen Checklisten über die Sicherheitsarchitektur bis hin zu den Steuer-Strategien – kannst du nun in Ruhe nachschlagen. „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten“ (Band 1) von Sascha Swen Heiter ist ab sofort überall erhältlich!


⚖️ Rechtlicher Hinweis & Haftungsausschluss (ESSENZIELL): Sämtliche Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschließlich der allgemeinen Information und Unterhaltung. Alle Angaben erfolgen ohne Gewähr.

  • Keine Beratung: Dieser Podcast stellt zu keinem Zeitpunkt eine Anlageberatung, Rechtsberatung oder Steuerberatung dar.

  • Eigenverantwortung: Krypto-Investments sind hochriskant und können zum Totalverlust führen. Jeder Hörer handelt auf eigene Gefahr und Verantwortung.

  • Steuern & Recht: Die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptowährungen ist hochkomplex. Bitte konsultiere zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater für die aktuelle Rechtslage in der DACH-Region (Deutschland, Österreich, Schweiz) für die Jahre 2025/2026.

  • Haftung: Eine Haftung für Schäden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrücklich ausgeschlossen.

Basiert auf dem Buch von Sascha Swen Heiter. Wir hören uns in der nächsten Staffel!


#Bitcoin #Finanzen #KryptoCorner #Geldanlage #Blockchain #SaschaSwenHeiter #Krypto #Crypto #DACH #Investieren2026 #Staffelfinale #WhiteSwan #WallStreet #ETFs #BonusFolge


]]>
